title: Recover Files
subtitle: Bring together the pieces your friends kept safe.
page_description: Each friend received a bundle with one piece of the key. Gather enough pieces below, add the encrypted archive, and your files will be decrypted here in the browser. Nothing leaves your device.
step1_drop: Drop bundle files here, or click to browse
step2_drop: Drop a recover.html or MANIFEST.age here, or click to choose it
step2_hint: Use a recover.html from any friend's bundle, or the MANIFEST.age file
paste_btn: Paste a piece or type recovery words
paste_placeholder: Paste piece text or type recovery words...
contact_list_hint: Reach out to these friends to gather their pieces
scan_hint: Point your camera at a QR code from a friend's PDF
error_invalid_words_guidance: Check the words for typos. Each word should match the list printed on the recovery sheet.
error_not_ready_message: The recovery tool is still loading.
error_invalid_share_message: The file "{0}" doesn't contain a valid piece.
error_invalid_share_guidance: Use the README.txt file from a bundle. It should contain text between 'BEGIN REMEMORY SHARE' and 'END REMEMORY SHARE' markers.
error_no_share_message: The file "{0}" doesn't contain a recovery piece.
error_no_share_guidance: Each friend received a bundle with a README.txt containing their piece. Check that you have the right file.
error_duplicate_guidance: Each piece can only be used once. Add a different friend's piece.
error_mismatch_message: This piece doesn't belong to the same set as the others.
error_mismatch_guidance: Each piece was created as part of a specific set. You can only combine pieces from the same set. Check that all pieces came from the same person's bundles.
error_file_read_guidance: The file may be corrupted or inaccessible. Try downloading it again, or ask your friend to resend their bundle.
error_bundle_extract_title: This doesn't look like a bundle
error_bundle_extract_guidance: Use the original bundle ZIP that was sent to you or one of your friends.
error_unrecognized_file_title: Not sure what to do with this
error_unrecognized_file_message: The file "{0}" doesn't seem to contain recovery data.
error_unrecognized_file_guidance: Try the README, recover.html, or bundle ZIP from one of the bundles.
error_html_no_share_guidance: This recover.html doesn't contain a recovery piece. Ask your friend to resend their bundle, or use the README.txt file instead.
error_paste_no_share_message: The pasted text doesn't contain a valid recovery piece.
error_paste_no_share_guidance: Copy the full content from a friend's README.txt, including the 'BEGIN REMEMORY SHARE' and 'END REMEMORY SHARE' markers. You can also type or paste recovery words.
error_decrypt_message: The archive couldn't be decrypted with the provided pieces.
error_decrypt_guidance: Make sure all pieces are from the same set. If you have extra pieces, try a different combination.
error_decrypt_status: Decryption failed. Check your pieces and try again.
error_extract_message: The decrypted archive couldn't be opened.
error_extract_guidance: The archive may be corrupted. If you have another copy of MANIFEST.age, try that instead.
error_extract_status: Extraction failed. The archive may be corrupted.
error_recovery_guidance: Check that you have the correct pieces and the right MANIFEST.age file. You can try again with different pieces.
tlock_waiting_message: Opens {0}. Wait here, or come back later.
tlock_no_support: This archive is time-locked. Use the recover.html from your bundle to open it.
tlock_error_message: Your pieces worked, but the time lock couldn't be verified. This usually means the network request was blocked.
tlock_error_guidance: Try a different browser (Chrome works best), or download the locked archive and use the CLI tool.
tlock_error_status: Time lock check failed. Your pieces are correct — try a different browser.
